overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the Jackson Plains industrial desert area toward Night City. The player navigates highways, intersections, and industrial infrastructure with the city skyline visible in the distance, featuring cyberpunk architecture and desert landscapes.

events.description: white pickup truck passes by on the right side of the road
Jackson Plains location marker appears on the left side of the screen

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert highway, maintaining speed and passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: white pickup truck driving in the same direction, gradually moving ahead

entered.detail: tall rusted industrial tower with multiple platforms and antennas
wooden utility poles with power lines stretching across the desert
large industrial facility with multiple buildings and smokestacks on the horizon
arid landscape with dry bushes, sand, and sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving along a desert highway through the Jackson Plains area. A tall industrial tower dominates the left side of the frame while power lines stretch across the landscape. The player passes a white pickup truck on the right as the location marker appears, with a massive industrial complex visible in the distant right.

events.description: approaching a major highway intersection with traffic lights
making a left turn at the intersection onto a new road
completing the turn and accelerating behind other traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection, executing a left turn and merging onto the new road

notable_agents.action: silver vehicle waiting at the intersection ahead of the player

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with horizontal lights at the intersection
paved road crossing with multiple lanes and turning paths
regulatory signs and markers along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a highway intersection marked by traffic lights and road signs. After making a left turn, the perspective shifts to a new road where the industrial tower now appears on the left and the distant industrial complex becomes more central. The player merges with sparse traffic continuing toward the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial access road with pipeline infrastructure

events.description: large red industrial truck overtakes on the left side
driving alongside elevated pipeline and conveyor structures

agents.ego_description: cruising along the industrial road, passing large trucks and infrastructure while approaching the city

notable_agents.action: large red industrial truck overtaking the player vehicle on the left

entered.detail: heavy industrial truck with red cab and cargo trailer
large elevated metal pipes running parallel to the road
industrial conveyor belt structure on stilts transporting materials
distant skyscrapers and high-rise buildings of Night City with neon accents

segments.scene_description: Driving through the industrial outskirts, the player passes a large red truck while massive pipeline infrastructure dominates the left side of the road. Elevated conveyors and industrial tanks line the route as the Night City skyline becomes prominently visible in the distance, marking the approach to the urban center.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach to city center

events.description: passing under large concrete overpass and bridge structures
navigating a curved section of road with guardrails
brief transition through shadow area or lighting effect

agents.ego_description: maneuvering under overpasses and along winding roads, approaching the city center with increasing infrastructure density

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead on the winding road toward the city

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with support pillars casting shadows
massive rusted pipes running along the ground level beside the road
red and white striped metal barriers along the road edge
tall advertising screens with illuminated displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment features driving under massive concrete overpasses that create partial shade, with industrial pipes and highway guardrails lining the route. The city skyline grows larger and more detailed as the road curves toward Night City. Neon billboards and cyberpunk architecture become visible on the right as the vehicle approaches the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the desolate industrial desert of the Jackson Plains toward the dense, neon-lit skyline of Night City. It begins with a vehicle cruising along a desert highway past a towering industrial spire and stretching power lines, passing a white pickup truck as a massive complex looms in the distance. As the vehicle navigates a highway intersection and makes a left turn, the perspective shifts to merge with sparse traffic, bringing the distant industrial structures more centrally into view. The scene then expands into the industrial outskirts, where the road is flanked by massive pipeline infrastructure, elevated conveyors, and large trucks before the city skyline becomes prominently visible. Finally, the camera glides under heavy concrete overpasses and past industrial pipes, with the urban center growing larger and more detailed as neon billboards and cyberpunk architecture emerge on the right.
